title: PreciseHealth
description: See your exact health without compromising looks!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Enjoy!

### What the Mod Does:

* Rebuilds the vanilla heart-rendering system
* Adds smooth health steps (10%, 20%, …) so hearts show your exact health level

### Dependencies:
* [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
